checks.name: internal_od_coverage
checks.message: 188 of 676 OD cells are zero in the screening demand matrix; this reflects tract-level internal LODES flows plus expansion, not a behavioral all-purpose demand model.

warnings: Pilot package uses Census tracts rather than custom TAZs or explicit external stations.
Static zone_attributes.csv omits households, so ActivitySim land-use packaging must join tract_marginals.csv or refresh ACS household totals.
Current run evidence is on an OSM-derived network, not a one-to-one replay of the TIGER screening network package.
